calendar.matters:
MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

No apperances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT PG&E CORPORATION's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE, is OFF CALENDAR; I stayed this case by an August 29, 2016 order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. FRANCIS A. BOTTINI OF BOTTINI & BOTTINI, INC., TEL. NO. 1-858-914-2001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ROBERT W. PERRINI OF LATHAM & WATKINS LLP, TEL. NO. 1-213-485-1234 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT PG&E CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is off calendar in light of the ruling on PG&E's motion for stay. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Bushkin Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. FRANCIS A. BOTTINI OF BOTTINI & BOTTINI, INC., TEL. NO. 1-858-914-2001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. ROBERT W. PERRINI OF LATHAM & WATKINS LLP, TEL. NO. 1-213-485-1234 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; RESPONDENT PG&E CORPORATION'S Motion To Stay Bushkin Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate is granted. Pursuant to CCP 128(a)(8) and Freiberg v. City of Mission Viejo (1995) 33 Cal.App.4th 1484, 1489, the court stays this action pending resolution of the criminal matter. There is no persuasive reason why the stay issued by the Court of Appeal should not apply to this writ of mandate case. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR # 6576 =302/hk

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

RESPONDENT PG&E CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO BUSHKIN'S VERIFIED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is continued to August 29, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 so Judge Kahn can hear them.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
